title: It Shouldn't Be This Hard Podcast

sections.podcastSubtitle: The podcast for people who know that responsible business is messy, meaningful, and probably much harder than it should be!
sections.podcastThumbnailAlt: It Shouldn't Be This Hard podcast trailer

paragraphs: In each episode, grounded co-founders Heidi Schoeneck and Phil White sit down with founders, corporate change-makers, sustainability leaders and social entrepreneurs who’ve been there and are doing it. They get stuck into honest and sometimes radically transparent conversations that corporations often try to avoid — about power, profit, fear and failure along with the many barriers and obstacles that often frustrate people and progress.

items.title: Honest Conversations
items.body: Our fearless founders get into the conversations most people avoid — about power, profit, fear, failure, purpose, and the many barriers that often frustrate progress.

items.title: Uncomfortable Questions
items.body: With a little help from Gaia, grounded’s AI sidekick, they poke at the uncomfortable questions and unpack the messy middle.

items.title: Science Meets Spirituality
items.body: The show bubbles up insights from behavioral science and spirituality — unique perspectives from both sides of the conscious leadership coin.
